Package io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.test.handler

Class TestClientMessageProcessorHandler

java.lang.Object
io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.test.handler.TestClientMessageProcessorHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageRequestHandler
@Component public class TestClientMessageProcessorHandler extends Object implements MessageRequestHandler
测试专用的Client消息处理器Handler 用于验证客户端MESSAGE请求的处理流程
